data.body: CI ripple fix: 625b removed outbound_differ._diff_fields re-export -> tests/integration/test_reconcile_live_e2e.py (runs in CI -m integration) broke. My unit-only preflight missed it. FIX: migrated 3 calls to _recon('outbound_fields')._diff_fields (removed 3 unused locals). LESSON: run 'pytest -m integration' in preflight. Also fixed tests/external/test_link_sync_roundtrip_live.py _diff_links 3->4 arg (eefd; external not CI-gated but real). Stacked-amend surgery via patch files (avoided stash): reset to 625b, apply+amend (Change-Id Ie1da05 kept), cherry-pick eefd, apply+amend (Change-Id Iaba8674 kept). Verified env-vars OK, integration 15 pass, neutrality 28 pass. Re-pushed 931 ps3 + 935 ps2.
